title: 30 years in the field. Same instinct, new tool.
description: Diagnose, fix, improve — that's what I've always done. Before with machines. Today with code and AI.
storyP1: 30 years diagnosing, fixing and optimizing in industry. Maintenance, production, quality — finding what's broken and solving it has been my instinct forever.
storyP2: Today I apply those instincts to the digital world. TOSA Python advanced certification, mentored by a senior developer. I build automations, custom tools and AI integrations — from diagnosis to turnkey delivery.
aiNote: ChatGPT is a tool. I'm the one who adapts it to your context.

benefits.title: Nothing to learn
benefits.description: I handle everything. You keep doing your job, I manage the digital side.

benefits.title: AI frees up your time
benefits.description: AI replaces the tasks you don't like doing. It frees you, it doesn't replace you.

benefits.title: Accessible and transparent
benefits.description: Free consultation. An automation can start at a few hundred euros. No surprises.

benefits.title: Always available
benefits.description: If it breaks, I fix it. Got a problem? We talk, we solve it. Like a real maintenance service.
